description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2024 Porsche Cayman GT4 RS, 4.0 F6, RWD, 493bhp, 7 Speed Auto. AED 659,000 or AED 10,324 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 21,919 KM's - Porsche Warranty Valid Until 20th March 2028 (Extendable) - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Weissach Package - Front Axle Lift - Leather / Race Tex Interior - Clubsport Package - Carbon Exterior Trims - Sports Exhaust - Light Design Package - LED Headlights incl. Porsche Dynamic Light System Plus - Chrono Package - Door Pull Loops in Silver - Chrono Stopwatch Dial in White - Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) - Porsche Torque Vectoring (PTV) with Mechanically Locking Differential - 7-speed Porsche Doppelkupplung (PDK) - 20" 718 Cayman GT4 RS Forged Alloys - Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) (Lowered 10 mm) - Navigation Module for Porsche Communication Management (PCM) - Steering Wheel with 12 O'Clock Marker - Voice Control - PDK Gear Selector in Leather - Matte Carbon Fiber Interior Trim - Door-Sill Guards in Carbon Fiber
